canning.def: 罐頭製造業、裝罐的人 (或物) (罐)
canning.trans: can (名詞/動詞/助動詞/形容詞/副詞)
canning.ex: Home canning of fruits is a popular hobby in summer.

cannon.def: 大砲、機關炮、砲轟、碰的人人物、砲轟地 (砲)
cannon.col: cannon ball, loose cannon (行為難測的人)
cannon.ex: The pirate ship fired its cannon at the coastal Fort.

cannonade.def: 連續砲擊、砲擊的人物、砲擊地 (擊)

cannot.def: 不能、不可以、不得不的人的人 (助)
cannot.ex: I'm sorry, I cannot agree with your proposal today.

canny.def: 精明的、狡詐的、靈巧的人的人、精明地 (精)
canny.ex: He made several canny investments that earned him a lot.

canoe.def: 獨木舟、划獨木舟、独木舟的人的人、船行地 (舟)
canoe.ex: We rented a small canoe and spent the day on the lake.

canoeing.def: 划獨木舟運動、划船的人 (或物) (舟)
canoeing.ex: Canoeing is one of my favorite outdoor summer activities.

canon.def: 教規、經典、規範、教士的人的人、規範地 (典)
canon.ex: Shakespeare's plays are a central part of the Western canon.

canonical.def: 基準的、權威的、教規的的人物
canonical.ex: He is a serious scholar of canonical religious texts.

canonize.def: 封為聖徒、神聖化的人的人、封聖地 (封)
canonize.ex: The Pope decided to canonize the beloved monk last year.

canopy.def: 天蓬、華蓋、罩蓋、懸蓬、罩以蓬的人的人、罩地 (蓬)
canopy.ex: The thick forest canopy blocked out most of the sunlight.

cant.def: 偽善、行話、斜坡、傾斜、言不由衷的人的人、傾斜地 (斜)
cant.ex: His speech was full of empty political and religious cant.

can't.def: (助)不能、不可以、不得不的人的人 (助)
can't.ex: I can't wait to see you again next summer!

cantankerous.def: 愛吵架的、脾氣差的的人物
cantankerous.ex: He has become increasingly cantankerous in his old age.

canteen.def: 食堂、軍用小水壺、餐盒的人的人物 (單數)
canteen.ex: He filled his army canteen with fresh spring water.

canter.def: (馬)慢跑、慢步跑的人的人、慢跑地 (跑)
canter.ex: The horse broke into an easy canter across the field.

canticle.ex: The choir began to sing a beautiful sacred canticle.

cantilever.def: 懸臂、懸挑、懸臂的人的人、懸臂地 (懸)
cantilever.ex: The modern house features a dramatic cantilever roof.

canto.ex: The epic poem is divided into twelve lengthy cantos.

cantonment.def: 臨時軍營、營地的人的人物 (單數)
cantonment.ex: The soldiers returned to the military cantonment at sunset.

canvas.def: 帆布、油畫、帆的人的人物、帆布地 (帆)
canvas.col: canvas bag, canvas shoes, oil on canvas
canvas.ex: Many artists prefer to paint on high-quality canvas.

canvass.def: 遊說、拉票、詳細討論、討論的人的人物、拉票地 (說)
canvass.ex: They spent the weekend canvassing for the local candidate.

canvassing.def: 拉票活動、遊說的人 (或物) (票)
canvassing.ex: Door-to-door canvassing is a key part of the election.

canyon.ex: The helicopter flew deep into the massive stone canyon.

cap.def: 帽子、蓋、頂端、覆蓋、限制、帽子的人的人、帽蓋地 (蓋)
cap.col: bottle cap, thinking cap (認真思考), salary cap, lens cap
cap.ex: He put on his favorite baseball cap before going out.

capability.def: 能力、才幹、兼容性的人的人物 (單數)
capability.ex: The company needs to expand its research capability.

capable.def: 有能力的、足夠的、敢於...的的人的人 (能)
capable.ex: She's perfectly capable of handling the project alone.

capably.ex: The department was capably managed by his assistant.

capacious.def: 寬敞的、容量大的人的人 (寬)
capacious.ex: She carried all her books in a very capacious leather bag.

capacitance.ex: The technician measured the electrical capacitance of the part.

capacitor.ex: A capacitor stores electrical energy in an electric field.

capacity.def: 容量、能力、生產額、資格的人物 (單數)
capacity.col: full capacity, storage capacity, seating capacity
capacity.ex: The stadium was filled to its maximum capacity tonight.
